calendar.matters:
Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-02-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Angeles Rodriguez's motion to compel post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections to special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 shall be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner Bruce Chan. Not reported.

Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Apr-22-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARVIN RAMIREZ'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS.
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. COURT VACATES ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND TAKES THE MATTER OFF CALENDAR, MOTION TO BE NOTICED IN DISCOVERY. LAW CLERK TELEPHONED THE MOVING PARTY AND INFORMED THEM OF THE RULING. (302/PJM) JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600
